violations.text: (Boxes of plantains ) were observed stored on the floor in the (produce cooler). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024

The plumbing(pipes) to the handwashing sink observed unaligned. System must be maintained in good repair or proper adjustment. Service was called during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024
The (fans) in the (produce cooler) area has an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2024
